testcase.name: connects to ChromaDB and marks the store as initialized
does not reconnect when already initialized
generates embeddings and calls collection.add for every batch of chunks
splits chunks into batches of BATCH_SIZE
returns mapped RetrievalResult entries for matching documents
returns an empty array when ChromaDB returns no documents
returns true when the collection contains at least one chunk for the lesson
returns false when no chunks are found for the lesson
calls collection.delete with the correct lessonId filter
does not throw when collection.delete rejects
